title: ruehssia asclepioidea
intro: Ruehssia asclepioidea, also known as Pleurisy root, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the Saxifragaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Ruehssia asclepioidea include relieving congestion, soothing irritated mucous membranes, and reducing inflammation in the lungs and airways. Traditionally, it has been prepared into teas, tinctures, and infusions, often combined with other herbs like lobelia and wild cherry bark, to support respiratory health and alleviate coughs.
